    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    Alien
    Represents an alien enemy in the Space Invaders game.
    Bullet
    Represents a bullet fired by the player.
    EntityManager
     
    GameFrame
    Main game window frame.
    GamePanel
     
    GameRenderer
     
    GameUI
     
    Leaderboard
     
    Leaderboard.Entry
     
    MenuPanel
    Main menu panel for Space Invaders game.
    Player
     
    PowerUp
     
    Shooter
    Represents the player's shooter/spaceship.
    SoundPlayer
    Utility class for playing game sounds.
    SpaceInvadersGame
    Main entry point for the Space Invaders game.
